name: Page of Pentacles
interpretation: ambitious, diligent, goal oriented, planner, consistent, star student, studious, grounded, loyal, faithful, dependable

name: King of Wands, reversed
interpretation: forceful, domineering, tyrant, vicious, powerless, ineffective, weak leader

name: Ace of Pentacles
interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation
